SchoolProfile.title: SchoolProfile
SchoolProfile.description: Represents the administrative and key descriptive information for the school using the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SchoolProfile entity.

name.description: The official name of the school.

taluka.description: The Taluka (sub-district) where the school is located.

district.description: The District where the school is located.

address.description: The physical address of the school.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the school administration.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the school administration.

establishmentDate.description: The date when the school was established.

sportsProgramDescription.description: A description of the school's sports programs and facilities.

healthFacilitiesDescription.description: A description of the school's health-related facilities and services.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a staff member, such as a teacher or coach, associated with the school, involved in sports or health management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

schoolId.description: Reference to the SchoolProfile this teacher belongs to. (Relationship: SchoolProfile 1:N Teacher)

name.description: The full name of the teacher or staff member.

qualification.description: The academic or professional qualification of the teacher (e.g., 'B.Ed', 'M.P.Ed').

role.description: The role of the teacher within the school's sports and health management (e.g., 'Sports Coach', 'Health Coordinator', 'Physical Education Teacher').

email.description: The professional email address of the teacher.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the teacher.

dateOfJoining.description: The date when the teacher joined the school.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a student registered as a player in the school's sports and health management system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Player entity.

serialNumber.description: A sequential serial number for display purposes, not necessarily unique across all records.

name.description: The full name of the player.

standard.description: The academic standard (grade) of the player.

age.description: The calculated age of the player in years.

bmi.description: The calculated Body Mass Index (BMI) of the player.

hasSportHistory.description: Indicates if the player has previous sport history.

sportHistoryDetails.description: Details about the player's past sport history, if any.

medicalConditions.description: Any known medical conditions or emergency information for the player.

firestore.reasoning: Standard registry pattern for institutional data scaling.
